text:
[Requirements]
Goal:           Compare the current implementation against the chosen source of truth.
Inputs:         Source:         docs/retry-spec.md
                Target scope:   services/retries
Constraints:    Full drift verification.
Assumptions:    The requested target scope is already precise enough.
Open questions: None.
